question: What are the average city fuel economy rate, average highway fuel economy rate for different types of powertrains?
sql: SELECT Type_of_powertrain, AVG(City_fuel_economy_rate) AS avg_city, AVG(Highway_fuel_economy_rate) AS avg_highway FROM Vehicles GROUP BY Type_of_powertrain;

back_translation.intent: 计算不同动力类型车辆的城市和高速燃油经济性的平均值

semantic.reason: 语义一致，无需额外说明
